title: Egyptian Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew inspired by Egyptian cuisine, made with rich and dense ingredients.

ingredients.name: Lamb or Vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: Use vegetable broth for a vegetarian option

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add diced eggplant and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add diced tomatoes and cook for 2 minutes.
Add broth, cumin, and paprika. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
